item.title: Men just want to be appreciated!
item.description: At the end of the day, most men simply want to feel valued, respected, and genuinely appreciated.

media:content.media:description: At the end of the day, most men simply want to feel valued, respected, and genuinely appreciated.

item.title: Showing your goofy side in relationships
item.description: Men are naturally drawn to women who can relax, laugh, and confidently show their goofy side.

item.title: She orders her husband around and expects him to just take it…
